acceptance.assertion: The native execution receipt separately records provider-created layout objects, board_list_items-visible objects and connector evidence; it no longer assumes that every connector appears in the general board inventory.
A layout whose operation readback and layout_read prove all connectors completes successfully even when board_list_items omits those connectors; the receipt does not claim partial mutation.
Negative tests prove that absent, malformed or fewer-than-declared connectors still fail closed and cannot be hidden by the visibility reconciliation.
The Miro quality path consumes layout-read connector evidence or reports connector observability as unavailable; it never silently converts an unobservable connector count into zero.
Unit, integration and full Schauwerk tests pass, and one isolated live Miro acceptance binds board inventory, layout_read and operation receipts without creating duplicate board content.

approval.note: The user has authorized cost-free Schauwerk optimization. Work must remain isolated, diff-reviewed, test-bound and must not repeat the already completed live board mutation.

goal: Make Schauwerk native delivery and visual quality verification distinguish provider-created connectors from the inventory exposed by board_list_items, so a complete layout does not produce a false failed or partial-mutation receipt while genuinely missing connectors still fail closed.

does_not_establish: permission to recreate or duplicate the live board
that board_list_items will expose connectors in future provider versions

id_collision_correction.reason: T036 is reserved by the merged Systemkatalog repository-lifecycle audit for the Heimlern compatibility-freeze task; this unrelated planned Schauwerk task had no queue, claim, dispatch or execution references when reassigned.

metadata.proposal_replaces_local_plan: 49bde60941aff42b5ae525c146da5b1621ff5c7b6fb7ffc36996477e828a15ee (review serialization changed nested key order; never published)

title: Make Miro connector observability truthful in Schauwerk
